column1: # Locked benchmark of 12 pivotal/representative rheum CAR-T trials.
# Ground-truth labels were curated from CT.gov and the published literature
# then cross-checked against the 2026-04-25 snapshot. Re-classification by the
# pipeline is verified per-axis in tests/test_benchmark.py.
# Axes mirror the pipeline's classifier outputs (no Branch — rheum is a single
# branch). DiseaseEntity uses the closed vocabulary from config.DISEASE_ENTITIES
# plus the special labels Basket/Multidisease and Other immune-mediated.

column8: ADI-001 CD20 γδ CAR-T in RA (Adicet)
